summary: Beat Mates iteration 4 testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). All bug fixes verified: 1) React hooks order in reels.tsx is correct - hooks before conditionals, 2) Calendar time picker has interactive up/down arrows for From/To times, 3) Profile picture update API works, 4) Story creation API works. Frontend loads without React hooks errors.

issues: Console warnings: expo-av deprecation (use expo-video), shadow* style deprecation (use boxShadow), pointerEvents deprecation, useNativeDriver not supported - all cosmetic warnings

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: reels.tsx ReelVideoPlayer hooks (useState, useRef, useEffect) are now correctly placed before conditional returns (lines 22-66)
BUG FIX VERIFIED: calendar.tsx time picker has interactive TouchableOpacity up/down arrows for both From (lines 190-222) and To (lines 228-260) time fields
FEATURE VERIFIED: Profile picture update works via PUT /api/users/me with profile_image field
FEATURE VERIFIED: Story creation works via POST /api/stories with media and type
FEATURE VERIFIED: Post creation works via POST /api/posts with media and caption
REGRESSION PASSED: Feed loads correctly (GET /api/posts returns posts)
REGRESSION PASSED: Stories load correctly (GET /api/stories returns grouped stories)
REGRESSION PASSED: Availability slots creation works (POST /api/availability-slots)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed posts for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported bugs are fixed: 1) Video crash - hooks order fixed in reels.tsx, 2) Profile picture - API works correctly, 3) Story publishing - API works correctly, 4) Calendar time picker - has up/down arrows. Video playback cannot be tested in Playwright Chromium due to H.264 codec limitation but the component renders without errors.

bug_fixes_verified.video_crash_hooks_error: FIXED - ReelVideoPlayer hooks (useState, useRef, useEffect) are now placed at component top before any conditional returns
bug_fixes_verified.calendar_time_picker: FIXED - calendar.tsx has TouchableOpacity with chevron-up/chevron-down icons for adjusting hours, plus minute toggle tap functionality
bug_fixes_verified.profile_picture_change: WORKING - PUT /api/users/me with profile_image field correctly updates and persists
bug_fixes_verified.story_publishing: WORKING - POST /api/stories with media and type creates story correctly

backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Returns token and user data
backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/posts: PASSED - Creates new post with media
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/stories: PASSED - Returns grouped stories by user
backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/availability-slots: PASSED - Creates availability slot with all fields

frontend_screens_tested.login_page: PASSED - Shows BEAT MATES branding, email/password inputs, Log in button works
frontend_screens_tested.home_feed: PASSED - Shows stories bar (Your Story + users), posts feed, tab bar with 6 icons, no React errors

reels.tsx_hooks_order.status: CORRECT - All hooks (React.useState lines 23-24, React.useRef line 25, React.useEffect lines 27-66) are called before conditional returns (lines 68-86)

calendar.tsx_time_picker.status: CORRECT - From time has chevron-up (190-199) and chevron-down (201-210), To time has chevron-up (228-237) and chevron-down (239-248), minute toggle functionality present
